summary: Full backend + frontend end-to-end test of Dharmaraj Ayurveda MVP. All 23 pytest backend cases passed. Frontend purchase + tracking flow fully functional. All 6 products, 6 blogs, 3 coupons working. Order placement returns valid DRJ order ID, tracking correctly validates mobile (403 on mismatch). Newsletter, contact, reviews, all policy/blog/FAQ pages render correctly.

issues: Radix DialogContent missing aria-describedby (accessibility warning, non-blocking)

action_items: Optional: add aria-describedby/Description to cart Sheet/Dialog components to silence Radix a11y warning
Consider exposing data-testid on newsletter input/submit, shop search/sort/filter, blog category chips, and FAQ search for easier future automation
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 596-line file mixing models, seed data, and routes — recommend splitting into models.py, seed.py, routers/*.py for maintainability (>700 lines threshold approaching)
POST /api/admin/reseed is public and destructive — should be protected by a secret/env-token even in MVP
create_review aggregates avg by loading all reviews into memory — use $group aggregation pipeline at scale
order endpoint hardcodes 5% GST and ₹999 free-shipping threshold — should be in config
Frontend cart Sheet uses Radix Dialog without Description prop — accessibility lint warning in console
test_credentials: Guest checkout. Mobile 9999999999, email test@dharmaraj.in used. Coupon WELCOME10 verified (₹129 off ₹1299).
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 6 products, 6 blogs, 6 reviews, 3 coupons on startup via ensure_seed(). One TEST_ review was created during tests; not cleaned up (low impact).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and are pytest-based. Run with: pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. State field on checkout is a <select> (use select_option, not fill). All payment radios (upi/card/netbanking/wallet/cod) work via data-testid='pay-option-{x}'. Cart Sheet overlay blocks clicks after Add-to-Cart — press Escape or close drawer before clicking next page elements. Wrong-mobile tracking returns 403 which surfaces a sonner toast on the frontend.
rca of the issue: No bugs detected. All flows healthy.
